name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures a candidate's ability to interpret and analyse numerical data presented in tables, charts and graphs to make correct business decisions.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning
description: Evaluates the ability to understand and evaluate written information, useful for roles that require reading and interpreting reports or policies.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning
description: Assesses a candidate's ability to identify patterns and solve problems from abstract, non-verbal information, a strong predictor of general learning ability.

name: Verify G+ (General Ability)
description: A short, adaptive general mental ability test combining numerical, verbal and inductive reasoning into a single score, often used as a first-stage screen.

name: OPQ32r
description: The Occupational Personality Questionnaire measures 32 dimensions of workplace personality, useful for understanding a candidate's preferred style of working, influencing and decision making.

name: Motivation Questionnaire (MQ)
description: Explores what energises and motivates a candidate at work, helping predict engagement and retention in a given role.

name: ADEPT-15
description: A adaptive personality assessment built for high-volume hiring, measuring 15 workplace traits to predict job performance and cultural fit.

name: Remote Work Questionnaire (RWQ)
description: Measures a candidate's readiness and preferences for remote or hybrid working arrangements, including self-discipline and communication style.

name: Global Skills Assessment (GSA)
description: A situational judgement test measuring a candidate's decision making across common workplace scenarios such as teamwork, customer focus and problem solving.

name: Contact Centre Situational Judgement Test
description: Presents realistic customer service scenarios to evaluate how a candidate would respond in a contact centre environment.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Tests core Java 8 programming knowledge including collections, streams, lambda expressions and object-oriented concepts.

name: Java Spring Boot
description: Assesses practical knowledge of building REST APIs and services using the Spring Boot framework.

name: Python (New)
description: Evaluates core Python programming skills including data structures, functions, error handling and basic scripting.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Tests fundamental JavaScript concepts including DOM manipulation, asynchronous programming and ES6 syntax.

name: SQL Server (New)
description: Measures a candidate's ability to write and optimise SQL queries, including joins, subqueries and stored procedures.

name: .NET Framework 4.5
description: Assesses knowledge of the .NET framework, C# syntax and common application development patterns.

name: C# Programming
description: Tests core C# language features including classes, interfaces, exception handling and LINQ.

name: HTML5 and CSS3
description: Evaluates front-end fundamentals including semantic HTML, responsive layouts and CSS styling techniques.

name: Selenium (New)
description: Tests practical knowledge of automated web testing using Selenium WebDriver, including locators and test scripting.

name: Manual Testing
description: Assesses a candidate's ability to design test cases, identify defects and follow a structured QA process without automation tools.

name: Automata - Fix (Coding Debugging)
description: A hands-on coding simulation where candidates fix bugs in existing code, measuring real-world debugging ability rather than pure syntax knowledge.

name: Automata - Selenium (Coding Simulation)
description: A live coding simulation that asks candidates to write and run Selenium automation scripts in a sandboxed environment.

name: Data Science (New)
description: Tests foundational data science knowledge including statistics, data cleaning and basic machine learning concepts.

name: Microsoft Excel 365
description: Assesses practical spreadsheet skills including formulas, pivot tables and data formatting in Excel 365.

name: Basic Computer Literacy
description: Measures fundamental computer skills such as file management, using a browser and basic office software, suited for entry-level roles.

name: Verify Typing Test
description: Measures typing speed and accuracy, commonly used for data entry and administrative roles.

name: Administrative Professional (New)
description: Evaluates skills relevant to office administration roles including scheduling, written communication and attention to detail.

name: Financial and Analytical Reasoning
description: Assesses the ability to interpret financial statements and analytical data, relevant for finance and analyst roles.

name: Sales Situational Judgement Test
description: Presents realistic sales scenarios to evaluate a candidate's approach to negotiation, objection handling and customer relationship building.

name: Workplace Safety Assessment
description: Measures a candidate's attitude towards workplace safety practices and rule following, common in manufacturing and logistics roles.

name: Verify Deductive Reasoning
description: Tests logical reasoning by asking candidates to draw valid conclusions from a set of given statements or rules.

name: Project Management Skills
description: Assesses knowledge of core project management concepts such as scheduling, risk management and stakeholder communication.
